---
title: Array Decomposition
author: 
    - name: Jan de Leeuw
      orcid: 0000-0003-1420-1797
      email: jan@deleeuwpdx.net
      affiliation: 
        - name: University of California Los Angeles
          city: Los Angeles
          state: CA
          url: www.ucla.edu
      license: "CC0"
date: last-modified
date-format: long
bibliography: [mypubs.bib, total.bib]
number-sections: true
pdf-engine: lualatex
keep-tex: true
format:
   pdf:
    fontsize: 12pt
    include-in-header: 
     - preamble.tex
    keep-tex: true
    link-citations: true
    documentclass: scrartcl
    number-sections: true
   html:
    fontsize: 12pt
    include-in-header: 
     - preamble.css
    keep-md: true
    number-sections: true
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
editor: source
papersize: letter
graphics: true
link-citations: true
mainfont: Times New Roman
abstract: TBD
---

```{r loadpackages, echo = FALSE}
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(knitr, quietly = TRUE))
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(tinytex, quietly = TRUE))
```

\sectionbreak 

**Note:** This is a working manuscript which will be expanded/updated
frequently. All suggestions for improvement are welcome. All Rmd, tex,
html, pdf, R, and C files are in the public domain. Attribution will be
appreciated, but is not required. The files can be found at
<https://github.com/deleeuw> 

\sectionbreak

# Introduction

# Decomposition

$$
a_i=a_\bullet+(a_i-a_\bullet)
$$

$$
a_{ij}=a_{\bullet\bullet}+(a_{i\bullet}-a_{\bullet\bullet})+(a_{\bullet j}-a_{\bullet\bullet})+
(a_{ij}-a_{i\bullet}-a_{\bullet j}+a_{\bullet\bullet})
$$

\begin{multline}
a_{ijk}=a_{\bullet\bullet\bullet}+(a_{i\bullet\bullet}-a_{\bullet\bullet\bullet})+(a_{\bullet j \bullet}-a_{\bullet\bullet\bullet})+(a_{\bullet\bullet k}-a_{\bullet\bullet\bullet})+\\
(a_{ij\bullet}-a_{i\bullet\bullet}-a_{\bullet j\bullet}+a_{\bullet\bullet\bullet})+\\
(a_{i\bullet k}-a_{i\bullet\bullet}-a_{\bullet\bullet k}+a_{\bullet\bullet\bullet})+\\
(a_{\bullet jk}-a_{\bullet j\bullet}-a_{\bullet\bullet k}+a_{\bullet\bullet\bullet})+\\
(a_{ijk}
-a_{ij\bullet}-a_{i\bullet k}-a_{\bullet jk}+a_{i\bullet\bullet}+a_{\bullet j\bullet}+a_{\bullet\bullet k}-a_{\bullet\bullet\bullet})
\end{multline}

# Projectors

$\{P_1(A)\}_{ijk}=a_{i\bullet\bullet}$

$\{Q_1(A)\}_{ijk}=\delta^{ijk}-a_{i\bullet\bullet}$

$\{P_{12}(A)\}_{ijk}=a_{ij\bullet}$

# Least Squares

# Interactions

# Log-linear Analysis

# Orthogonal functions

Suppose $M_n$ is the set of matrices $X$ of order $n$ with

* first column all elements equal to one, and
* $X'X=nI$.

Suppose the array $A$ is $n\times m\times \ell$. Choose $X\in M_n$, $Y\in M_m$, and $Z\in M_\ell$. Define
$$
\alpha_{ijk}=\sum_{i'=1}^n\sum_{j'=1}^m\sum_{k'=1}^l a_{i'j'k'}x_{i'i}y_{j'j}z_{k'k}
$$
